testimonials.title: They Simplified Their Daily Lives
testimonials.subtitle: Concrete solutions that truly change entrepreneurs' lives

thierry.name: Thierry
thierry.text: Before, it was hell: calls at all hours, reservations on Instagram, texts... We wasted so much time and had no-shows every week. Now, 100% of our reservations go through WhatsApp Business. The system automatically asks the right questions (date, time, number of people), sends confirmation and even a little reminder the day before. Result: we cut no-shows in half, I save at least 1 hour per day, and my customers love the simplicity. Honestly, it was super simple to set up and I would never go back. I recommend it to all restaurants tired of juggling reservations!

sophie.name: Sophie M.
sophie.text: We spent hours writing newsletters and LinkedIn posts. With AInspiration's AI, we generate quality content in minutes. Our engagement rate jumped 40% and we publish 3 times more often. The team is thrilled to focus on strategy rather than writing.

marc.name: Marc D.
marc.text: Our customer service was overwhelmed. Since we implemented the virtual assistant, 70% of requests are handled automatically. Our customers get instant responses 24/7, and my team can finally focus on complex cases. The ROI was visible from the very first month.

seoIntro.title: Artificial Intelligence for Belgian and French SMEs
seoIntro.p1: In 2026, Artificial Intelligence is no longer reserved for large corporations. At AInspiration, we make AI accessible to all SMEs: restaurants, e-commerce businesses, consulting firms, marketing agencies, craftsmen and freelancers. Our mission is simple — save you time and money through intelligent automation solutions, with no technical skills required.
seoIntro.subtitle1: Concrete, measurable results from the first month
seoIntro.p2: Our clients see an average ROI of 180%, a 60% reduction in time spent on repetitive tasks and a 45% increase in productivity. Whether it's automating booking management, generating marketing content, deploying a virtual assistant or optimizing your customer service, our solutions adapt to your industry and specific needs.
seoIntro.p3: Everything starts with a free, no-obligation audit. Within 24 hours, we analyze your processes, identify automation opportunities and deliver a concrete action plan. Then, we deploy the solution within 48 hours maximum. Based in Enghien, Belgium, we support businesses in Belgium and France with multilingual support in French, English and Dutch.
seoIntro.p4: All your data is hosted in Europe and processed in strict compliance with GDPR. We use cutting-edge technologies — intelligent chatbots, AI data analysis, content generation, smart CRM — while guaranteeing the confidentiality and security of your business information.

faq.q1: Do I need technical skills to use your solutions?
faq.a1: Absolutely not! Our solutions are designed to be easy to use. We handle all the technical aspects.
faq.q2: How long does it take to implement an AI solution?
faq.a2: Most of our solutions are operational within 48 hours. The free audit takes 24 hours.
faq.q3: Is the audit really free with no strings attached?
faq.a3: Yes, 100% free and no commitment. We analyze your business and deliver a concrete action plan.
faq.a4: Absolutely. We are GDPR compliant and all data is hosted in Europe.
faq.q5: What type of business can benefit from your services?
faq.a5: Any SME can benefit! Restaurants, e-commerce, marketing agencies, consulting firms, craftsmen...
